license: Project-owned procedural SVG/Canvas art generated for this H5 game.

player.description: 陈归川：油蜡外衣、工具腰带、半块玉佩、老油灯、工兵铲/桃木剑姿态由 Canvas 矢量实时绘制。

enemies.description: 中式恐怖怪物剪影：纸行者、纸轿夫、哭嫁童、红衣影与后续章节怪物。

prologueMaps.description: 序章地图关键物件：末班车、废弃车站、雨夜山路、陈家老宅、地窖/无名墓。

ui.description: 移动端按钮使用 DOM 清晰文字标签；HUD、札记、存档、线索墙由 CSS/DOM 渲染。

qualityRules: All interactive prologue props must have named IDs and matching INTERACTS entries.
All prologue maps must define darkness, ambient sound, and at least one readable landmark.
Core runtime assets are SVG or Canvas vector art to avoid blurry mobile scaling.
